Have you been there?

osm.label: OpenStreetMap
osm.text: The data comes from {{osmLink}} — a free, collaborative world map built by millions of volunteers. Only what has been mapped will appear here.

contribute.label: Contribute playgrounds
contribute.text: Anyone can contribute. A good starting point is {{learnOsmLink}}. The relevant tags are documented in the {{wikiLink}} and on the page about {{equipmentLink}}.

photos.label: Add photos
photos.text: Photos can be uploaded directly via {{mapcompleteLink}} — just open a playground and click "Add photo". Photos are provided via {{panoramaxLink}}.

community.label: Community
community.text: Questions or want to get involved? The local OSM community can be reached via {{chatLink}}.

history.label: History
history.text: The playground map was created by {{authorLink}} as a final project of a {{courseLink}} — originally focused on Berlin. Over time it was developed into a generic playground map that can be used for any OSM region.

project.label: The project
project.text: The playground map is a free, interactive web map based on {{osmLink}} data. It contains no proprietary data, requires no login and does not track users. Anyone who improves playground data in OSM automatically improves this map.

source.label: Source code
source.text: The project is open source and {{repoLink}}.
